sidebar.campaignInProgress: A campaign is in progress. Pause it from its detail screen to use the rest of the app.
sidebar.desktopOfflineHint: MonchoOps desktop is not running. The extension keeps working locally.

popup.operatesOnAccount: The extension will operate on the IG account you're logged into in this browser.
popup.logIntoIgFirst: Log into <0>instagram.com</0> first, then come back here.
popup.noCampaignsRunning: No campaigns are running or paused.

settings.title: Settings
settings.instagramHint: The extension uses whichever Instagram account is logged into your browser. No account selector — log out of IG to switch.
settings.desktopHint: When the desktop app is running, you can pull leads directly from your saved categories and scrape results — no CSV export step.
settings.dataHint: Everything is stored locally in your browser (IndexedDB). Nothing leaves this device except the DMs you send through Instagram.
settings.clearAllDataConfirm: Delete all campaigns, leads, and history from this browser? Variant groups live on the desktop app and are not affected.
settings.languageHint: Choose the interface language. "System" uses your browser's preferred language.

home.prompt: What do you want to do today?
home.coldDmDescription: Launch a DM campaign to your lead list.
home.categoriesDescription: Browse and manage the lead categories synced from the desktop.

newCampaign.title: New cold DM
newCampaign.description: Pick your audience, write your message, hit Start. The browser handles the rest.
newCampaign.manualPlaceholder: One per line, or comma/space separated. @ prefix is optional.
newCampaign.fileNoUsernames: No usernames found in this file.
newCampaign.fileDropHint: Drop a usernames file or click to browse
newCampaign.fileFormatHint: CSV or TXT — first column is the username.
newCampaign.desktopLeadsLine: {{count}} leads — pulled live from MonchoOps. Use Re-fetch to pick up new leads added on the desktop after this campaign was started.
newCampaign.desktopPickTitle: Pick a desktop category or scrape
newCampaign.desktopPickHint: Pulls leads live from the MonchoOps desktop app.
newCampaign.noLeadsHint: No leads yet — pick a tab above to add some.
newCampaign.variantsCount: {{count}}/{{max}} - one picked at random per DM -
newCampaign.noSavedGroups: No saved groups yet — create one from the Variants screen.
newCampaign.intervalHint: Minimum 30s — lower paces trip Instagram's anti-spam. A small jitter is applied per send so the cadence is not robotic.
newCampaign.saveAsGroup: Save as a new group on the desktop
newCampaign.warmTargetDescription: Before each DM, visit the target's profile, optionally follow them, and like a few of their recent posts. Already-followed targets are never unfollowed.
newCampaign.followDescription: Sends a follow request. Skipped when already following / requested.
newCampaign.likeDescription: Likes this many of their most recent posts. Skipped when the profile has no posts or is private.
newCampaign.watchStoriesDescription: Silently views any active stories before the DM. Skipped when no story is available.
newCampaign.interactionsFootnote: A human-ish delay sits between the interactions and the DM so the funnel reads as organic to Instagram's anti-spam checks.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.description: Cold DM runs you've scheduled or completed.
campaigns.noneHint: Import a CSV of usernames, write your message variants, and schedule when to send.
campaigns.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? Leads and history are kept.

campaignDetail.desktopSourceLinked: Linked to the desktop app. Click sync to pull leads added there after this campaign was created.
campaignDetail.desktopNoNewLeads: No new leads on the desktop.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Lead categories — synced live with the desktop app.
categories.noneHint: Group scraped leads under a shared name. Create one here or run a scrape on the desktop.
categories.createDialogHint: Pool scraped leads under a shared name. Created here, pushed to the desktop the next time it's reachable.
categories.deleteDialogBody: This removes the category and every lead pooled inside it. Linked scrapes stay intact.

categoryDetail.noLeadsTitle: No leads in this category yet
categoryDetail.noLeadsHint: Run a scrape tagged with this category on the desktop to populate it.
categoryDetail.showingFirst: Showing first 1000 rows — full list available on the desktop.
categoryDetail.addDialogHint: Paste usernames — one per line, or comma-separated. Pushed to the desktop on the next sync.
categoryDetail.parsedSummary: {{parsed}} parsed - {{fresh}} new (others already in this category)

queue.title: Queue
queue.description_one: {{count}} active job across extension and desktop
queue.description_other: {{count}} active jobs across extension and desktop
queue.nothingRunningHint: Active campaigns or desktop jobs show up here in real time.

scrapes.title: Scrapes
scrapes.description: Lead scrapes that ran on the desktop. Read-only — start a scrape from the desktop app.
scrapes.noneHint: Run one from the desktop app — it'll show up here once it finishes.
scrapes.searchPlaceholder: Search by summary, target, kind or account…

history.title: DM history
history.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, account or source…
history.noneYet: No DMs sent yet — your first run will show up here.

historyDetail.noLogHintDesktop: This desktop run hasn't been pulled yet, or it predates the detail log.
historyDetail.noLogHintCampaign: Send your first DM in this campaign to populate the log.

variants.title: Variants
variants.description: Reusable message-variant groups, synced with the desktop app.
variants.noneHint: Save a named set of DM variations once, reuse it across campaigns. Variants created here sync to the desktop app automatically.
variants.dialogHint: One variant is picked at random per DM when this group is used in a campaign. Saved groups sync with the desktop app.

desktopImport.title: Import from desktop app
desktopImport.couldNotConnectBody: Start the MonchoOps desktop app on this computer and try again.
desktopImport.couldNotConnectError: Could not connect to the desktop app
desktopImport.noCategories: No categories on the desktop yet.
desktopImport.noScrapes: No scrape results on the desktop yet.
